channel.title: Sound baths in Denver · Sound Bath Calendar
channel.description: A weekly-updated calendar of sound baths in Denver, Colorado: dates, times, venues, prices, and ticket links for every listed session. Part of the Front Range sound bath calendar.

item.title: Midweek Harmony Reset - Sound Bath
item.description: A midweek restorative sound bath at The Denver Village in Aurora, Wednesday July 22 from 5:30-6:30 PM. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/midweek-harmony-reset-sound-bath-2026-07-22-the-denver-village/

item.title: Gong Journey
item.description: A gong journey presented by Sound Murals at Harmonist Sanctuary in Denver, Wednesday evening. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/gong-journey-2026-07-22-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Stretch & Sound
item.description: A 60-minute stretch-and-sound session with Christina Epps at Sacred Society in Denver's Highlands, Friday July 24 at 6:00 PM. Where: Sacred Society, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/stretch-sound-2026-07-24-sacred-society/

item.title: MindFree Fridays Sound Healing
item.description: The recurring MindFree Fridays evening sound healing at Karma Yoga Center on South Broadway, Friday July 24 at 7:00 PM (weekly series). Where: Karma Yoga Center, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/mindfree-fridays-sound-healing-2026-07-24-karma-yoga-center/

item.title: Activating Your Inner Fire: Guided Meditation and Sound Healing Immersion
item.description: A guided meditation and sound-healing immersion hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Friday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/activating-your-inner-fire-guided-meditation-and-sound-healing-immersion-2026-07-24-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: 45-Minute Reset: Sound, Movement, Breath & Laughter
item.description: A 45-minute session of sound immersion, movement and breathwork led by Kochun-Ra at Inca Street Collective in La Alma-Lincoln Park, Friday July 24 at 7:15 PM. Where: Inca Street Collective, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/45minute-reset-sound-movement-breath-laughter-2026-07-24-inca-street-collective/

item.title: Creative Poetry Sound Bath
item.description: A sound bath with aromatherapy and space for writing and group sharing, hosted by All Things Serene at Harmonist Sanctuary on East Colfax, Denver, Saturday at 5pm. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/creative-poetry-sound-bath-2026-07-25-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Crystal & Gong Sound Concert in the Salt Cave
item.description: Salt-cave sound concert with crystal bowls and gong led by Ann Martin at 5 Star Salt Caves on South Pearl Street, Saturday July 25; $60. Where: 5 Star Salt Caves Wellness Center, Denver. Price: $60. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/crystal-gong-sound-concert-in-the-salt-cave-2026-07-25-5-star-salt-caves-wellness-center/

item.title: Sound Bath: Sacred Rest Ritual
item.description: A sound bath framed as a rest ritual at Sacred Society in Denver, Sunday morning. Where: Sacred Society, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-bath-sacred-rest-ritual-2026-07-26-sacred-society/

item.title: Buck Moon Sound Bath
item.description: A Buck Moon sound bath led by Shelby Moor at The Denver Village, Sunday evening. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/buck-moon-sound-bath-2026-07-26-the-denver-village/

item.title: Breathwork + Sound Healing Immersion
item.description: A breathwork and sound-healing immersion hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Monday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/breathwork-sound-healing-immersion-2026-07-27-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: Singing Bowls at the Gardens: Sunrise to Starlight
item.description: A reclined singing-bowl and gong sound meditation with Ann Martin in Mitchell Hall at Denver Botanic Gardens, Tuesday July 28 at 5:30 PM; $25 general, $22 members. Where: Denver Botanic Gardens, Mitchell Hall, Denver. Price: $25. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/singing-bowls-at-the-gardens-sunrise-to-starlight-2026-07-28-denver-botanic-gardens-mitchell-hall/

item.title: Sound Immersion with the Harmonic Quintessence (Hg)
item.description: A sound immersion led by Vialet B Rayne at Merritt Wellness in Denver, Tuesday evening; $70. Where: Merritt Wellness, Denver. Price: $70. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-immersion-with-the-harmonic-quintessence-hg-2026-07-28-merritt-wellness/

item.title: Candlelight Sound Bath
item.description: A candlelit sound bath with crystal singing bowls and chimes, hosted by Liminal Lemonade at Harmonist Sanctuary on East Colfax, Denver, Wednesday evening at 7:15pm. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/candlelight-sound-bath-2026-07-29-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Full Moon Sound Bath
item.description: A full-moon sound bath hosted by Revive Wellness at 929 29th St in Denver, Thursday evening; donation-based. Where: 929 29th St, Denver. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/full-moon-sound-bath-2026-07-30-929-29th-st/

item.title: Full Moon Sound Medicine Journey
item.description: A full-moon sound journey hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Friday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/full-moon-sound-medicine-journey-2026-07-31-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: Psychic Sound Bath Wash Park
item.description: Outdoor sound bath with singing bowls and gongs led by Dr. Adrian Voss at Washington Park, Saturday August 1 at 3:00 PM; free. Where: Washington Park, Denver. Price: Free. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/psychic-sound-bath-wash-park-2026-08-01-washington-park/

item.title: Energy Healing + Sound Bath Immersion
item.description: An energy-healing and sound bath session led by Kathy Sietos at Green Light Reiki in Denver, Sunday afternoon. Where: Green Light Reiki, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/energy-healing-sound-bath-immersion-2026-08-02-green-light-reiki/

item.title: Deep Restorative Sound Bath & Guided Meditation
item.description: A restorative sound bath and guided meditation led by IzaBelle Sweet at the Denver Public Library's Woodbury Branch, Tuesday evening; $15–40. Where: Denver Public Library: Woodbury Branch Library, Denver. Price: $15–40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/deep-restorative-sound-bath-guided-meditation-2026-08-04-denver-public-library-woodbury-branch-library/

item.title: Denver Sound Bath Collective-Smiley
item.description: A sound bath from the Denver Sound Bath Collective, led by IzaBelle Sweet, at the Denver Public Library's Smiley Branch, Wednesday evening; $15–40. Where: Denver Public Library: Smiley Branch Library, Denver. Price: $15–40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/denver-sound-bath-collectivesmiley-2026-08-05-denver-public-library-smiley-branch-library/

item.title: Sacred Sound Bath ❤ Dawn Stratton & Vialet Rayne
item.description: A sound bath led by Dawn Stratton and Vialet Rayne at Discover Your Spiritual Gifts in Denver, Friday afternoon; $40. Where: Discover Your Spiritual Gifts, Denver. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sacred-sound-bath-dawn-stratton-vialet-rayne-2026-08-07-discover-your-spiritual-gifts/

item.title: Co-Regulation Sound Bath
item.description: A partner co-regulation sound bath using crystal singing bowls at The Denver Village in Aurora, Friday August 7 from 6:00-7:00 PM. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/coregulation-sound-bath-2026-08-07-the-denver-village/

item.title: First Friday: Flow State Sound Bath
item.description: A First Friday sound bath presented by Liminal Lemonade at Harmonist Sanctuary in Denver, Friday evening. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/first-friday-flow-state-sound-bath-2026-08-07-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Sacred Healing Sound Bath ❤ Vialet B Rayne & Dawn Stratton
item.description: A sound bath led by Vialet B Rayne and Dawn Stratton at Discover Your Spiritual Gifts in Denver, Friday evening; $40. Where: Discover Your Spiritual Gifts, Denver. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sacred-healing-sound-bath-vialet-b-rayne-dawn-stratton-2026-08-07-discover-your-spiritual-gifts/

item.title: Vibrations of Peace: Gong Bath & Sound Immersion
item.description: A gong bath and sound immersion led by Meg Munster with Mile High Mindfulness in Denver, Sunday afternoon. Where: Mile High Mindfulness, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/vibrations-of-peace-gong-bath-sound-immersion-2026-08-09-mile-high-mindfulness/
